title: [Feature] Customize Ok/Failed Response, Tracing Request/Response Error, Logger
author: dou-kaizen
body:
Hi anh, em thấy hiện tại source mình chưa có custom cho response. Kiểu hiện tại em thấy các dự án lớn có một structure response cho Ok riêng, Error riêng để phía client có thể define đc Interface từ đầu.

Ngoài ra, việc bổ sung thêm Tracing (trace_id) ở request header và response, Logger là điều cần thiết.

https://medium.com/@alexanderknips/open-telemetry-with-multiple-nestjs-and-logs-in-tracing-62453e3e6cb2

title: Feature (Docker): Support to local develop based on Docker
author: khuongln-1346

title: Feature (Pubsub): Implement subscriber, publisher, connect to Redis
author: khuongln-1346
body:
- Implement worker (subscriber)
- Implement publisher (Update API register user by email)
- Integrate Redis

title: Feature (Auth Module): Implement resend verify email API
author: khuongln-1346
body:
- Implement **resend verify email API**
- Write Unit test for this API

title: Feature (Auth Module): Implement forgot password API
author: khuongln-1346
body:
- Implement **forgot password API**
- Write Unit test for this API

title: Feature (Auth Module): Implement verify email API
author: khuongln-1346
body:
- Implement **Verify email API**
- Write Unit test for this API

title: Feature (mail service)
author: khuongln-1346
body:
- Implement **Mail service**
- Custom mail log by using pino logger

title: Feature (Post Module): Implement update post API

- Implement **Update Post API**
- Write Unit test for this API

title: Feature (Post Module): Implement delete post API

- Implement **Delete Post API**
- Write Unit test for this API
